# Parayok

> Agile Poker Planning Tool Integrated with Jira

## Overview
Parayok is a modern, real-time Scrum Poker planning application that connects directly with your Jira instance. It allows Agile teams to estimate story points seamlessly without manual data entry.

## Key Features
- **Jira OAuth Integration**: Login securely using Jira and fetch your profile.
- **Real-Time Collaboration**: Vote on issues, see who is online, and reveal scores in real-time.
- **Direct Jira Sync**: Once a team agrees on a story point estimate, the room manager can save the final score directly back to the Jira ticket.
- **Guest Access**: External team members or stakeholders can join rooms via a link using just a display name.
- **Ice Breakers**: While waiting for issues to be added, teams can answer randomized Ice Breaker questions synced across all participants.

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: Vue 3 (Composition API), Vite, TailwindCSS, Pinia.
- Backend: Laravel 11, Sanctum (Auth), Reverb (WebSockets for real-time events).
- Integration: Jira REST API (ADF parsing supported).

## Links
- Website: https://parayok.space

## Contact
For support or inquiries, please contact the maintainers.
